workflow: Conduct a thorough vendor analysis and create a shortlist of preferred vendors.
Develop a comprehensive RFP document outlining the requirements and terms of the blanket agreement.
Send out the RFP to the shortlisted vendors and conduct a thorough evaluation of their responses.
Negotiate the terms of the blanket agreement with the selected vendor(s) and finalize the agreement.
